# Youkeo Studios

> Professional recording studio in Airoli, Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India.
> Founded by Nischay Beharam (artist aliases: Shoonya & Rhyo), music producer with 13+ years experience and 1M+ Spotify streams.

Youkeo Studios is a full-service music studio offering vocal recording, instrument recording, music production, mixing, mastering, and music distribution for independent artists, bands, and brands. Located in Sector-19, Airoli, Navi Mumbai — 8 minutes from Airoli Railway Station. 200+ artists recorded. 5-star rated.

## Services

- **Vocal & Instrument Recording**: From ₹800/hr (first session 30% off), ₹1,200/hr regular
- **Music Production**: Beat, arrangement & full production from ₹8,000/song
- **Mixing**: Professional stereo mix from ₹4,000; stem mix from ₹8,000
- **Mastering**: Included in full package; streaming-ready delivery
- **Recording to Final Package**: ₹14,000/song (2hrs recording + mix & master)
- **Release & Promotion**: Distribution, playlist pitching & Meta Ads from ₹2,000/month

## Key Pages

- Homepage: https://youkeostudios.com/
- Recording Services: https://youkeostudios.com/recording/
- Full Pricing: https://youkeostudios.com/pricing/

## Location

Near ICICI Bank, Sector-19, Airoli, Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra 400708, India
Open 7 days a week: 11 AM – 10 PM IST

## Credentials

- 200+ artists recorded
- Tracks produced here have 1M+ Spotify streams (e.g. O Sajna by Swapnil Chaudhary, Dooriyan by Gravero/Rhyo/Kinara, Aarzoo by Shoonya & Kinara)
- 10+ Spotify editorial playlist placements including New Music Friday India
- Opened for / after-party sets for artists: Ben Böhmer, Korolova, Zafrir
- GST Registered (Recording SAC 999611; Mixing/Mastering SAC 999613)
